name: gSetup
description: Nodics setup, onboarding, and instruction package. This folder is module-like for standard repository organization but is not part of runtime startup.
rules: Do not add package.json unless gSetup is intentionally promoted into the runtime module hierarchy.
Do not include gSetup in active server, node, or module startup lists.
Do not place generated artifacts under gSetup.
Keep LLM guidance tool-neutral and project-owned.
